name: Apple Crunch Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until fine crumbs form.
3. Combine egg and milk. Add to dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Stir in apples.
5. Spoon batter into paper-lined 2 1/2-inch muffin-pan cups, filling 2/3rds full.
6. Sprinkle with nut crunch topping (see below).
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
NUT CRUNCH TOPPING: Mix together brown sugar (packed), chopped pecans, and ground cinnamon in a small bowl.
